machine_note: Mode A gemshorn repo; natural horn, slip-cast ceramic, and CNC-routed split-wood paths.
assumptions: This is a pre-CAM operation graph, not verified G-code.
Verify feeds, speeds, work envelope, hold-down, and tool clearance at the machine.
Run simulation or air-cut before cutting instrument material.
Tune final pitch empirically by measured volume, fipple behavior, leak behavior, and hole opening.

operations.name: Review design package and choose build method
operations.notes: Start with GEM-SC-C5 unless the goal is historical horn reference.

operations.name: Prepare natural horn blank
operations.tool: Fine saw, scrapers, mild detergent, calipers

operations.name: Fabricate slip-cast master
operations.tool: 3D printer or 1/4 in ball end; sealant; sandpaper

operations.name: Prepare CNC wood halves
operations.tool: Surfacing bit, 1/4 in upcut, 1/4 in dowel drill

operations.name: Route CNC wood cavity halves
operations.tool: 1/4 in ball end; optional 1/8 in ball end
operations.notes: Pre-CAM plan only; verify in CAM before cutting.

operations.name: Final validation and documentation
operations.notes: Feeds site and future empirical corrections.

release_checks: Every operation has a datum and workholding method.
All tuning-critical features include trim allowance.
Wood body passes leak test before exterior shaping.
Ceramic body has measured shrinkage before production molds.
Natural horn blank is documented as a one-off tuned instrument.
